title: PLAN_JSON
description: Output schema for the PrivateClaw Planning Core (/api/plan). Must be returned as bare JSON with no surrounding prose or markdown fences.

action.description: Next action to execute. Selection order: RESPOND_DIRECT > SEARCH_WEB > ASK_CLAUDE.

goal.description: Short human-readable goal for this plan step.

why.description: Bullet-point justification for the chosen action.

state_update.description: Incremental update to the persisted agent state.

hypotheses_delta.description: Hypotheses to add, update, or close (with confidence delta).

evidence_add.description: New evidence items with credibility and freshness.

open_loops_add.description: New open research loops to track.

queue_add.description: New tasks to append to the execution queue.

questions_to_user.description: At most ONE blocking question. Empty array if not blocked.

why_it_blocks.description: Why progress is blocked until this is answered.

what_changes_if_answered.description: What new actions become available once answered.

web_queries.description: Sanitized SearXNG queries. Must be empty unless action=SEARCH_WEB.

query.description: Fully sanitized query — zero PII, no emails, phones, or user file paths.

why.description: Short justification for this specific query.

claude_spec.description: Abstract technical spec for ASK_CLAUDE. Must be empty unless action=ASK_CLAUDE.

inputs_schema.description: Abstract input field types (no real values).

constraints.description: Local-only constraints: no PII, no secrets, no external URLs.
